title: Unused React typed props should be removed
description: Unused React typed props should be removedAnalyze your codeconsistency-conventionalmaintainabilityCode SmellreactWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoLeaving unused props in a React component can make the code harder to understand and maintain. Other developers may wonder why certain props are passed to a component if they are not used. Unused props can also increase the size of the component’s memory footprint and impact performance.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

checks.message: TODO comment indicates unused props that should be removed.
FIXME comment indicates unused props that should be removed.
Property marked as @unused should be removed from props definition.
Remove unused prop marked in comment.
XXX comment indicates unused prop that should be removed.
